label: Loop Clip
desc: Submit inventory to the video-from-looping-clip-over-mp3 processor. Requires 'clip' (short video) and 'audio' in inventory. Optionally stores output files back into inventory under the configured keys.

params.name: videoKey
params.label: Store video.mp4 as
params.helpText: Clip looped to the full length of the audio track. Leave blank to skip.

params.name: coverKey
params.label: Store cover.avif as
params.helpText: 10-second AVIF preview extracted from the clip. Leave blank to skip.

params.name: textKey
params.label: Store text.md as
params.helpText: Title and body text content. Leave blank to skip.
